nasb.text: He struck down some of the men of Beth-shemesh because they had looked into the ark of the Lord. He struck down of all the people, 50,070 men, and the people mourned because the Lord had struck the people with a great slaughter.

esv.text: And he struck some of the men of Beth-shemesh, because they looked upon the ark of the Lord. He struck seventy men of them, and the people mourned because the Lord had struck the people with a great blow.

cnv.text: 耶和華因為伯．示麥人偷窺他的約櫃，就擊殺他們；他擊殺了七十人。眾人因為耶和華用大災擊殺他們，就哀哭起來。

ccb.text: 那一天，耶和华击杀了七十个伯·示麦人，因为他们擅自观看约柜里面。民众为此哀恸不已，
